task_completion.description: Verify that the Sales Quotes module has been enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Sales Quotes' tab should be visible in the left-hand navigation menu of the Manager.io interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Sales Quote is being created for the correct customer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Sales Quote form or final view, the Customer field should display 'Alfreds Futterkiste'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Date and Expiry Date are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Date field should show '2025-06-15' and the Expiry Date field should show '2025-07-15'.

task_completion.description: Verify the first line item is added correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line item exists with Description 'Organic Chai Tea (Case of 24)', Qty '10', and Unit Price '18.00'.

task_completion.description: Verify the second line item is added correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line item exists with Description 'Chang Mineral Water (Case of 12)', Qty '25', and Unit Price '9.50'.

task_completion.description: Verify the third line item is added correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line item exists with Description 'Aniseed Syrup (500ml Bottle)', Qty '50', and Unit Price '5.00'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Sales Quote is successfully created and the total amount is correct.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the saved Sales Quote view (not just the edit form) with a final Total of '667.50'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Manager.io web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Manager.io application running in a web browser, rather than terminal commands or API scripts being executed.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually entered the data into the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data should be visible inside the Manager.io form fields or the rendered Sales Quote page, not just typed into a text editor or a mock HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Any visible terminal windows should not show sqlite3 commands or direct database manipulation scripts targeting the Manager.io backend.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task is performed in Manager.io (http://localhost:8080) for the business 'Northwind Traders'. The target customer is 'Alfreds Futterkiste'. The expected Date is '2025-06-15' and Expiry Date is '2025-07-15'. The quote must contain three line items: 1) 'Organic Chai Tea (Case of 24)' Qty: 10, Price: 18.00; 2) 'Chang Mineral Water (Case of 12)' Qty: 25, Price: 9.50; 3) 'Aniseed Syrup (500ml Bottle)' Qty: 50, Price: 5.00. The correct total for the Sales Quote is exactly 667.50.
